meta.title: How Delulu Are You?
meta.description: 12 questions to measure your delusional confidence in romance, career, and self-image. What's your Delulu Score?

app.title: How Delulu Are You?
app.subtitle: Measure your delusional confidence in romance, career, and self-image
app.disclaimer: This test is for fun only and is not a professional psychological assessment.

q1.text: Do you rehearse conversations that will never happen?

q2.text: Have you planned your future with someone you've never spoken to?

q3.text: When someone is nice to you, what's your first thought?

q4.text: Do you believe you could become famous if you really tried?

options.d: I'm already famous, people just don't know yet

q5.text: How often do you imagine your acceptance speech?

options.b: Once or twice, just for fun
options.d: I've thanked specific people by name

q6.text: Someone leaves you on read. What happened?

options.b: They might be thinking of the perfect reply
options.d: Their phone broke from the power of my message

q7.text: How do you see yourself in 5 years?

options.d: On the cover of a magazine

q8.text: A stranger smiled at you. What does it mean?

options.d: It was love at first sight
They'll come back, they always do

q11.text: You see your crush's Instagram story. You think:

options.b: I wonder what they're up to
options.d: This is basically a love letter

q12.text: When you look in the mirror, you see:

options.d: The main character of the universe

grounded.name: Grounded
grounded.tagline: Cold hard reality. Therapists love you.
grounded.analysis: You see the world as it is — no rose-tinted glasses, no Hollywood soundtracks. While others are daydreaming about their crushes, you're reading the room correctly. Your therapist would be proud. Realistic king/queen!

slightly.name: Slightly Delulu
slightly.analysis: You've got a healthy mix of fantasy and reality. You dream, but you also set alarms. You might rehearse one conversation, but you know it won't actually happen. The perfect balance of hope and realism!

solulu.name: Delulu is the Solulu
solulu.tagline: The sweet spot of positive delusion.
solulu.analysis: You've cracked the code! Your positive delusions actually fuel your confidence. You believe in yourself just enough to make things happen. Science says a little self-enhancement bias is actually healthy — you're living proof!

daydreamer.name: Professional Daydreamer
daydreamer.analysis: Your imagination runs a whole production studio. Every crush is a rom-com, every job interview is your origin story, and every mirror is a photoshoot. You don't just dream — you direct, produce, and star in the movie of your life.

movie.name: Living in a Movie
movie.analysis: Reality? Never heard of it. You exist in a universe where every stranger is falling for you, every setback is a plot twist, and you're always one montage away from success. Your delulu levels have transcended human understanding. Iconic.

share.text: My Delulu Score: {score}% - {tier}! How delulu are you?
